mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `patch_scan_strategy` ( id, enabled, cron_expression, target_type, target_host_ids, timeout_minutes, concurrency, retry_count, ai_analysis_enabled, last_executed_at, next_execution_at ) VALUES ( COALESCE(#{id}, 1), #{enabled}, #{cronExpression}, #{targetType}, #{targetHostIds}, COALESCE(#{timeoutMinutes}, 10), COALESCE(#{concurrency}, 20), COALESCE(#{retryCount}, 3), COALESCE(#{aiAnalysisEnabled}, 1), #{lastExecutedAt}, #{nextExecutionAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE enabled = VALUES(enabled), cron_expression = VALUES(cron_expression), target_type = VALUES(target_type), target_host_ids = VALUES(target_host_ids), timeout_minutes = VALUES(timeout_minutes), concurrency = VALUES(concurrency), retry_count = VALUES(retry_count), ai_analysis_enabled = VALUES(ai_analysis_enabled), last_executed_at = VALUES(last_executed_at), next_execution_at = VALUES(next_execution_at)
